bull.summary: Blackwell shipments exceed expectations, margins expand back to 76%, and sovereign AI demand accelerates.
drivers: Unprecedented demand visibility (12 months sold out)

base.summary: In-line beat and raise. Data center stays strong but margins remain flat due to transition costs.

bear.summary: Export controls bite harder than expected, or hyperscaler CapEx commentary softens.

historical_matches.setup_summary: Similar transition period from Ampere to Hopper, accompanied by massive data center demand surge.
historical_matches.outcome: Stock gapped up 24% post-earnings as guidance completely shattered Wall Street consensus.

historical_matches.setup_summary: High expectations leading into the print, but minor margin compression due to supply constraints.
historical_matches.outcome: Stock traded sideways initially before rallying 2 weeks later as supply chain fears eased.
